question_pt: Quais anos tiveram volume extremamente baixo de internacoes e podem indicar cobertura parcial?
sql: WITH anual AS (SELECT year(DT_INTER) AS ano, COUNT(*) AS internacoes FROM internacoes GROUP BY 1), stats AS (SELECT quantile_cont(internacoes, 0.25) AS q1, quantile_cont(internacoes, 0.75) AS q3 FROM anual) SELECT a.ano, a.internacoes, s.q1, s.q3, s.q1 - 1.5 * (s.q3 - s.q1) AS limite_inferior_iqr FROM anual a, stats s WHERE a.internacoes < s.q1 - 1.5 * (s.q3 - s.q1) ORDER BY a.ano
